ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data is collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  "people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Actual number of people vaccinated */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Actual number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "people_with_booster" INTEGER /* Actual number of people with a booster shot */,
  "people_vaccinated_per_hundred" REAL /* Percentage of people vaccinated per 100 population in the age group */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated_per_hundred" REAL /* Percentage of people fully vaccinated per 100 population in the age group */,
  "people_with_booster_per_hundred" REAL /* Percentage of people with a booster shot per 100 population in the age group */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Rate of vaccination (people vaccinated / total population) */,
  "fully_vaccination_rate" REAL /* Rate of full vaccination (people fully vaccinated / total population) */,
  "booster_rate" REAL /* Rate of booster shots (people with booster / total population) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location (population / area) */,
  "healthcare_workers" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare workers in the location */,
  "vaccination_centers" INTEGER /* Number of vaccination centers in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "age_group_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the age group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  "vaccination_priority" TEXT /* Priority level for vaccination in this age group (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval by regulatory bodies */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required for full vaccination */,
  "booster_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for booster shots (e.g., recommended, not recommended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the center */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the center is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the center */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people that can be vaccinated per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination data entry */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person vaccinated */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine used */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Number of the dose (1, 2, etc.) */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the healthcare worker who administered the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id")
)
